name: relay
description: Relay — a beautiful web remote for your Android TV, over your own WiFi.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n bridge,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @relay/bridge" "npm run dev -w @relay/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @relay/shared && npm run build -w @relay/web && npm run build -w @relay/bridge
